scripts.netlify: cd packages/epicenter-styles && npm install && cd ../epicenter-components-vue && npm install && cd ../.. && npm install && bash scripts/copy-icons-from-npm.sh && npm run build-storybook
scripts.netlify:react: cd packages/epicenter-styles && npm install && cd ../epicenter-components-react && npm install && cd ../.. && npm install && bash scripts/copy-icons-from-npm.sh && npm run build-storybook:react
scripts.netlify:vue-combined: npm run netlify && npm run netlify-build-docs && cp -r docs/.vitepress/dist storybook-static/docs
scripts.netlify-build-docs: npm install && cd docs && npm run docs:build
scripts.install-all: cd packages/epicenter-styles && npm install && cd ../epicenter-components-vue && npm install && cd ../epicenter-components-react && npm install && cd .. && npm install
scripts.yalc:publish-all: cd packages/epicenter-styles && yalc publish && cd ../epicenter-components-vue && yalc publish && cd ../epicenter-components-react && yalc publish && cd ../epicenter-icons-vue && yalc publish && cd ../epicenter-icons-react && yalc publish
